   384	        dyn_cast_or_null<VPBasicBlock>(VPBB->getSinglePredecessor());
   385	    if (!PredVPBB || PredVPBB->getNumSuccessors() != 1)
   386	      continue;
   387	    WorkList.push_back(VPBB);
